subject: Hurry, the McFlurry® Pecan Salted Caramel won't stick around... 🍦

 Final chance to get the McFlurry ® Pecan Salted Caramel!

Just a little reminder, Denys.

The McFlurry ® Pecan Salted Caramel is waiting for you at McDonald’s ®. And trust us: it doesn’t take “no” for an answer.

A seriously tempting combo of creamy ice cream, rich caramel sauce and crunchy pecan pieces.

But, uh, it’ll be gone again before you know it. So go on, make your way to McDonald’s ® and treat yourself. Yes, really. Right now. No overthinking. Just go.
